metaDescription: Interactive CV of Pablo Arroyo, a Technology Product Manager with 8+ years of experience in e-commerce and project management. Explore my skills, career path, and projects.
heroTagline: With over 8 years of experience, I orchestrate teams, optimize processes, and deliver impact using AI.
zebrandsDesc: Led +15 annual projects. Achieved +$500K USD in savings with a FedEx MVP. Generated +$1.1M USD through e-commerce strategies.
tecDesc: Training future engineers in agile methodologies, with 90% application in real projects with companies like Coca-Cola FEMSA.
natgasDesc: Managed a $420K USD budget. Implemented RPA to reduce repetitive tasks by 87%. Improved team efficiency by 25%.
peltDesc: Advised companies like Cargill and Uber Freight, identifying 15-20% savings opportunities in transport and supply chain.
aiProjectsSubtitle: Showcasing my capability to build with AI.
projectRetiroDesc: Personal Retirement Simulator for Mexico projecting future pension considering AFORE, PPR, and Private Savings. Features personalized AI-driven bilingual recommendations powered by Google Gemini and clear legal-logic modeling for Mexican pensions (Ley 97).
projectRetiroTech: Next.js 14, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui, Google Gemini, Vercel
projectZebrandsImgDesc: A high-performance utility designed to streamline e-commerce operations by optimizing visual assets. This tool enables fast, high-quality local conversion from PNG/JPG to WebP, significantly reducing page load times. Developed with a focus on UX efficiency and local processing to ensure data privacy and speed.
projectZebrandsImgTech: React, Tailwind CSS, Vite, Local Asset Conversion
projectFedexDesc: Designed and launched an MVP to connect our WMS with FedEx, automating 18,500 packages and reducing manual errors by 40%.
projectCrossSellDesc: Implemented UX improvements to boost cross-selling and up-selling in e-commerce.
projectOmniDesc: Optimized the 'In-Store Pickup' program, redesigning the e-commerce and logistics flow.
projectRpaDesc: Led the implementation of RPA to mitigate operational risks, automating tasks and freeing up the team for higher-value activities.
projectGlobalDesc: Coordinated projects with suppliers in Denmark and the US, managing deliverables, contracts, and the integration roadmap in English.
projectGlobalResult: Result: Successful alignment of international teams.
projectAgileAulaDesc: As a professor, I train the next generation of engineers in Scrum, Kanban, and KPI management with Power BI.
projectAgileAulaResult: Result: 90% of students apply the techniques.
achievementsSubtitle: My accolades and the foundation of my career.
pmpDesc: Certification as a Project Management Professional.
honorDesc: GPA 4.0/4.0 in Master's and Bachelor's degrees.
teachingDesc: +9.5/10 for 4 consecutive years at Tec de Monterrey.
egelDesc: National CENEVAL recognition for exit exam results.
toolsSubtitle: The stack I use to build and manage.
contactSubtitle: I'm looking for a team where I can continue to build impactful products. Let's talk.
